metadata.title: HNA FlightPass Assistant - HNA FlightPass Route Search | Night Flight Tool
metadata.description: HNA FlightPass Assistant is an open-source HNA FlightPass route search tool, with smart filters for night (20:00-23:59) and early morning (00:00-08:00) flights to help you plan FlightPass trips efficiently. Flight data is a historical snapshot; this is an independent third-party project.
metadata.keywords: HNA FlightPass Assistant,HNA FlightPass,FlightPass route search,FlightPass guide,night flights,early morning flights,Hainan Airlines FlightPass,666 FlightPass,2666 FlightPass,FlightPass tool
